productDisplayName: Nike Men Brown Flyclave LTR Casual Shoe
description: Build your casual shoe closet around these nike Flyvcave LTR shoes from nike that come with luxurious suede uppers offering superb Fit and comfort. Team these with jeans and tees for those casual occasions. Upper Premium suede upper for comfort and durability Upper stitched to the outsole for extended durability Lightly padded collar for comfort Reinforced overlay on the toe box for abrasion-free comfort Midsole Synthetic lining with a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole in exaggerated herringbone pattern for cushioning and grip Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not machine wash
